Consulting Accelerator™
Centralized Consulting Model
Most consultants start out using a centralized control
model with them at the center of everything. This
includes: Clients, contractors, billing, support etc.
This is the best model to use when starting out because
you can oversee everything yourself, it’s fast, it’s simple
and you don’t need to rely on anything else.
The problem arises when you start to add more clients,
contractors and processes to the system with you still
at the center. Eventually, with enough scale, this model
will break and/or the consultant will burn out.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

Consulting Accelerator™
Decentralized Consulting Model
For a consulting business to scale successfully it must
switch from a centralized model to a decentralized model.
A decentralized model means that the consultant is no
longer the only resource for information, there are multiple
sources for information and both clients and contractors
can go to these sources and get what they need without
interrupting the consultant.
Most people think that this means hiring people, but that’s
not the only way. You can use things like: Facebook groups,
FAQ documents, Help centers, Workflow documents etc.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com
